question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It delivered a complete solution with explanations but never engaged the user with prompts or teachable forks.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed for the user. The 'Key design decisions' table presents conclusions rather than surfacing tensions (e.g., regex vs translate, Unicode punctuation handling) for the user to reason about.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no progression — it's a single-turn dump of the full solution. No gradient of difficulty, no opportunity for the user to attempt anything.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and friendly, and the user's recap was acknowledged implicitly by ending. But there's no real back-and-forth; the conversation ends in one turn with the user essentially self-checking.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
